title: Slot-Buffer State Space Model (SSM) for Working Memory
filing_authority: MEOK Sovereign Substrate (SOV3) — IP-First AI Operating System
abstract: A working-memory architecture for transformer-based language models that augments the KV-cache with a fixed-size slot buffer, where each slot is an SSM (state space model) maintaining a continuous state across conversation turns. Unlike the standard KV-cache (which is purely a read-cache for attention), the slot buffer supports (a) selective write by a learned gating function, (b) read via attention but write via a parallel SSM that compresses history, and (c) explicit slot-reset operations triggered by user or BFT events. The novelty is the combination of slot-addressable working memory with SSM-style temporal compression in a deployed LLM inference path, enabling longer effective context without quadratic attention cost.

claims.claim: A method comprising: (a) augmenting a transformer KV-cache with S fixed-size slots, each slot being a SSM state vector of dimension d; (b) a learned gate g(x_t) ∈ [0,1]^S determining which slots are updated on token x_t; (c) slot updates are computed by an SSM recurrence h_s^{t+1} = A h_s^t + B x_t; (d) attention reads the concatenation [KV-cache || slot states]; (e) explicit reset operations zero out one or more slots, triggered by user input, BFT events, or learned signals.
The method of claim 1, wherein the SSM is structured (e.g., diagonal A, HiPPO initialization) to support O(S) memory and O(S) per-token compute, independent of context length.
The method of claim 1, further comprising a 27-character slot allocation: each of the 27 sovereign characters receives a dedicated slot, enabling character-conditioned memory without retraining.

novelty_distinction: Prior SSM work (Mamba, S4, S5, H3) replaces attention wholesale. The hybrid (KV-cache + SSM slots) is novel.
Prior memory-augmented LLM work (MemoRAG, MemoryBank) uses external vector stores. The in-cache slot buffer is novel.
The 27-character slot allocation is a novel application of the architecture to a multi-persona sovereign system.
implementation_status: DESIGNED + PROTOTYPED in SOV3. 27 slot allocation maps directly to the 27 sovereign characters. Pytorch prototype in pytorch_adapter.py. Awaiting model retraining for production deployment.
